column1: Federal-Mogul Goetze (India) Ltd manufactures, supplies, and distributes automotive components like pistons, piston rings, etc to two/three/four-wheeler automobiles in Indian and International markets. It was established in 1954 as a joint venture with Goetze-Werke of Germany. Goetze- Werke is owned by Federal-Mogul. Presently, It operates as a subsidiary of Tenneco Inc, post-Tenneco’s acquisition of Federal-Mogul. [1]
